raw_title: Uneven Echoes: Gender’s Divergent Influence on Candidate Personalization and Voter Response in Taiwan
title_en: Uneven Echoes: Gender’s Divergent Influence on Candidate Personalization and Voter Response in Taiwan
title_zh: 不均衡的回响：性别对台湾候选人个人化与选民反应的差异性影响
plain_summary_zh: 这项研究探讨性别如何影响台湾政治中候选人的个人化表现以及选民的不同反应。它关注男性和女性候选人在竞选中的差异，以及这些差异如何影响选民的选择。
plain_summary_en: This study examines how gender influences the personalization of candidates and voter responses in Taiwanese politics. It focuses on differences between male and female candidates in campaigns and how these affect voter choices.
research_direction_zh: 研究性别在政治传播中的作用，特别是在候选人形象塑造和选民互动方面，以理解性别如何塑造选举动态。
research_direction_en: Investigating the role of gender in political communication, particularly in candidate image-building and voter engagement, to understand how gender shapes electoral dynamics.
